title: mirabilis laevis var. glutinosa
intro: Mirabilis laevis var. glutinosa, also known as the sticky four o'clock, is a variety of the Mirabilis laevis plant, a species of flowering plant in the four o'clock family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mirabilis laevis var. glutinosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
